title: Vanilla+ (Client)
description: A collection of client-side mods to improve the vanilla experience
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ec8a799c97590cbee71633295a33fa7a2e8aa76.png)

The Vanilla+ modpack is aimed at making the vanilla experience much easier and more appealing to an overall audience, without adding any actual external content. The pack is made so that it can be used in any vanilla server (matching the game version) without any conflicts or incompatibilities.

The mods included in this pack are primarily optimization based, as well as many small quality of life additions such as JEI or Xaero's Minimap.

The pack is best paired with it's [server side counterpart](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla+server), which will further improve the vanilla experience.

If you want a more modded experience with the same vanilla feel, check out my [Vanilla++ pack](https://modrinth.com/project/spicyee-vanilla++)

-----

## **Resource Packs:**

[Axolotl Bucket Variants](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-bucket-variants)

[Colorful Sheared Sheep](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-sheared-sheep)

[Xali's Enchanted Books](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enchanted-books)

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) (Reccomended, Not Included)

## **Shader Packs:**

[BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)

[Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla)
